videos.headline: James Franklin takes ownership after Penn State's loss to Oregon
videos.description: James Franklin acknowledges Penn State has to find a way to win against the top teams after he falls to 4-21 vs. AP top-10 opponents following the loss to Oregon.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Presser (James Franklin takes ownership after Penn State's loss to Oregon) 2025/09/28
